violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item stored in an unapproved location. -Sauce cooler was holding slightly higher temps. COS--Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Peta bread stored in contact with the rack in the kitchen freezer.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Salad bowls stored vertical in salad cooler
